# Warplane

> Interchain Control Plane for Avalanche L1s. Observe, manage, and orchestrate
> Avalanche L1 subnets from a single pane of glass.

Warplane is a TypeScript + Go monorepo providing unified observability, lifecycle
management, and cross-chain orchestration for Avalanche subnet operators.

## Product

- [docs/product/one-pager.md](docs/product/one-pager.md): Product vision, target users, and key capabilities

## Architecture

- [packages/domain/src/index.ts](packages/domain/src/index.ts): Core domain types: ChainId, Subnet, HealthStatus, ChainStatus
- [packages/storage/src/index.ts](packages/storage/src/index.ts): Storage interfaces for chain state persistence
- [packages/ingest/src/index.ts](packages/ingest/src/index.ts): Data ingestion pipeline stub

## Planning

- [docs/planning/roadmap.md](docs/planning/roadmap.md): Milestone breakdown and timeline
- [docs/planning/status.md](docs/planning/status.md): Current milestone progress
- [docs/planning/work-items.yaml](docs/planning/work-items.yaml): Machine-readable task tracking
- [docs/planning/backlog.md](docs/planning/backlog.md): Deferred items for future milestones
- [docs/planning/risk-register.md](docs/planning/risk-register.md): Known risks and mitigations
- [docs/planning/working-agreement.md](docs/planning/working-agreement.md): Coding standards and conventions

## Architecture Decisions

- [docs/decisions/README.md](docs/decisions/README.md): ADR index and process
- [docs/decisions/0001-use-structured-madr.md](docs/decisions/0001-use-structured-madr.md): ADR-0001: Use Structured MADR
- [docs/decisions/0002-use-monorepo-with-ts-and-go.md](docs/decisions/0002-use-monorepo-with-ts-and-go.md): ADR-0002: Monorepo with TS + Go
- [docs/decisions/0003-fixture-first-day1-mvp.md](docs/decisions/0003-fixture-first-day1-mvp.md): ADR-0003: Fixture-first MVP
